creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Update applied, thanks.  Thanks also for your careful attention to 
MASTER_SITES. 

For some reason, the patch to Makefile did not apply cleanly, and 
I had to do it by hand.  If I introduced any errors in the process, 
be sure to let me know.  (Of course, I did test it, but still...)
